summary: Campaigns Module (Phase 5 Strangler Fig) testing completed. All 27 backend API tests passed. The new modular campaigns routes from /app/backend/routes/campaigns.py are working correctly with USE_NEW_CAMPAIGNS_ROUTES=true.

minor.issue: Fixed: Was returning null instead of default settings for new campaigns. Changed campaign.get('followup_settings', DEFAULT_FOLLOWUP_SETTINGS) to campaign.get('followup_settings') or DEFAULT_FOLLOWUP_SETTINGS

critical_code_review_comments: Campaigns module extraction is clean and follows Strangler Fig pattern correctly
routes/campaigns.py properly imports from services/campaign_service.py and services/auth_service.py
Feature flag USE_NEW_CAMPAIGNS_ROUTES=true correctly routes to new modular campaigns routes
User isolation is properly enforced - users can only access their own campaigns
All CRUD operations work correctly: Create, Read (list/single), Update, Delete
Status transitions work correctly: start (draft->active), pause (active->paused)
Followup settings endpoints work: GET returns defaults for new campaigns, PUT updates settings
Service injection pattern (set_services) properly injects check_subscription_limit_fn, get_tier_features_fn, icp_service
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from responses using {'_id': 0} projection
Subscription tier limits are enforced on campaign creation (403 for users without active subscription)

test_credentials.user_b: test_user_b@example.com / Test456! (no active subscription - used for isolation tests only)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Campaigns module (Phase 5 Strangler Fig) fully tested. New modular routes in /app/backend/routes/campaigns.py and /app/backend/services/campaign_service.py are working correctly. Feature flag USE_NEW_CAMPAIGNS_ROUTES=true in backend/.env enables the new routes. All campaigns endpoints tested: CRUD operations, start/pause status transitions, followup settings. User isolation verified - users can only see/modify their own campaigns. Note: score-all-leads endpoint was not tested as it requires ICP service with test data. User B (test_user_b@example.com) has no active subscription so cannot create campaigns - used only for isolation tests.

tests: Enforces subscription limits (403 for inactive subscription)
Changes status from draft to active
Changes status from active to paused
Returns default settings for new campaigns
Cannot access other user's followup settings (isolation)
User cannot access other user's campaign
User cannot update other user's campaign
User cannot delete other user's campaign
User cannot start other user's campaign
User cannot access other user's followup settings
Users see only their own campaigns in list

skipped_tests.POST /api/campaigns/{campaign_id}/score-: Requires ICP service with test data and leads assigned to campaign

bug_fixes_applied.issue: get_campaign_followup_settings returned null instead of defaults for new campaigns
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Changed campaign.get('followup_settings', DEFAULT_FOLLOWUP_SETTINGS) to campaign.get('followup_settings') or DEFAULT_FOLLOWUP_SETTINGS
